description: build_payment_snpe calls Snpe_SNPEBuilder_setRuntimeProcessor(SNPE_RUNTIME_DSP) to route the network to the Hexagon DSP. The other two builders run on CPU because the DSP doesn't implement their ops. Unifying onto a shared builder that drops the setRuntimeProcessor call re-introduces a 28x battery-burn regression.

findings.rationale: Snpe_SNPEBuilder_setRuntimeProcessor returns int but the value is discarded — its effect is on the builder's internal config state. Constructor-side-effect family.
